allow: Bash(npx prisma init)
Bash(pm2 logs --lines 30 --nostream 2>/dev/null || journalctl -u pm2 --lines 30 --no-pager 2>/dev/null || echo "No logs found")
Bash(npm run build 2>&1)
Bash(pm2 restart all)
Bash(pm2 logs --lines 10 --nostream 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\(Ready|error|Error\)" | tail -5)
Bash(pm2 restart all && sleep 3 && pm2 logs --lines 50 --nostream 2>/dev/null)
Bash(pm2 logs meowsms-web-1 --lines 30 --nostream 2>/dev/null | tail -30)
Bash(npx ts-node scripts/check-api.ts 2>&1)
Bash(node scripts/check-api.js 2>&1)

Bash(npx prisma db execute --stdin 2>&1 << 'EOF'
SELECT "name", "apiUrl", "isActive", 
  CASE WHEN "apiKey" IS NULL THEN 'NOT SET' ELSE SUBSTRING\("apiKey", 1, 8\) || '...' END as apiKeyPrefix
FROM "ApiCredential";
EOF)

Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "SELECT \\"name\\", \\"apiUrl\\", \\"isActive\\", CASE WHEN \\"apiKey\\" IS NULL THEN 'NOT SET' ELSE SUBSTRING\(\\"apiKey\\", 1, 8\) || '...' END as apiKeyPrefix FROM \\"ApiCredential\\";" 2>&1)
Bash(pm2 logs meowsms-web-1 --lines 100 --nostream 2>&1)
Bash(node scripts/update-api.js 2>&1)
Bash(npx tsx scripts/update-api.js 2>&1)
Bash(env | grep -i database | head -1 || echo "DATABASE_URL not in env")

Bash(export PGPASSWORD='Stark++@843431' && psql -h localhost -U meowsms -d meowsms -c "SELECT s.\\"id\\", s.\\"code\\", s.\\"name\\", s.\\"serverId\\", srv.\\"name\\" as serverName, s.\\"isActive\\" FROM \\"Service\\" s JOIN \\"OtpServer\\" srv ON s.\\"serverId\\" = srv.\\"id\\" LIMIT 5;" 2>&1)
